description: Integrate the health test module into the app: update index.html with script tag, update core.js with navigation items and routes for both admin and portal views.
steps: In /projects/sandbox/hr-legal-app/index.html, add a script tag for modules-test-kesehatan.js after the last module script (absensi-ijef.js): <script src="modules-test-kesehatan.js?v=6.0" charset="utf-8"></script>

In /projects/sandbox/hr-legal-app/core.js, add admin nav item in the 'Karyawan' nav group. Add ['test-kesehatan','🏥','Test Kesehatan'] to the items array in the line: nav+=navGroup('👥 Karyawan',[...])

In /projects/sandbox/hr-legal-app/core.js, add portal nav item for staff/leader. Add ['portal-test-kesehatan','🏥','Test Kesehatan'] to a relevant portal nav group (suggest: under 'Pekerjaan' group alongside jobdesk, disc, kpi)
In /projects/sandbox/hr-legal-app/core.js, add routes in the routes object inside navigateTo(): 'test-kesehatan':renderTestKesehatan, 'portal-test-kesehatan':renderPortalTestKesehatan
acceptance_criteria: index.html includes script tag for modules-test-kesehatan.js
core.js routes object contains 'test-kesehatan' mapping to renderTestKesehatan
core.js routes object contains 'portal-test-kesehatan' mapping to renderPortalTestKesehatan
Admin sidebar shows 'Test Kesehatan' under Karyawan group
Portal sidebar shows 'Test Kesehatan' under Pekerjaan group
npm run validate passes (or at least no new errors introduced)
verification: Grep core.js for 'Test Kesehatan' nav item in buildNavItems
findings: All 4 integration points added successfully. Node --check passes on core.js. npm run validate not run due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network (no npm install available).
